title: The Crew Reaches the Floating Restaurant Baratie
description: On pages 1–4, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: Brother Zoro! Brother Luffyy! Brother Usopp! Brother Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you think, every- one!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They're not going to attack us now, are they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! We ain't pirates over here!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmm, never seen that pirate flag before...

dialogue.speaker: Fullbody
dialogue.text: I'm the Lieutenant of the Marine Headquarters known as "ironfist fullbody."

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I just finished making my pirate flag the day before yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: H-He said... the day before yesterday! haha!

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
